title: Fix hang when `path` doesn't exist
body: I'm not sure if this is an OS-specific issue, but on CentOS 8, if `path` doesn't exist, this hangs while waiting to read from this socket, even though the socket is closed by the `reexec_in_user_namespace`.  Switching to a pipe fixes the problem, and pipes shouldn't be an issue since this is Linux-specific code.
